name: python3-mdurl
title: python3-mdurl
summary: Python port of the JavaScript mdurl package
description:
Python port of the JavaScript mdurl package
mdurl is a set of URL utilities for the markdown-it-py package. It
provides a pure-Python implementation of several functions from the
original JavaScript package, such as .decode(), .parse(), .encode().
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-mdurl because Python port of the JavaScript mdurl package.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-mdurl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-mdurl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-mdurl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
